name: Claude Code Sandbox
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq yq ripgrep fd-find bat tree htop file xxd bsdmainutils gh git-delta xmlstarlet && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/fdfind /usr/local/bin/fd 2>/dev/null || true; sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/batcat /usr/local/bin/bat 2>/dev/null || true; devbox install && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli && HOST_KEY=$(echo "$HOST_WORKSPACE" | tr '/' '-'); CONTAINER_KEY=$(echo "$PWD" | tr '/' '-'); if [ "$HOST_KEY" != "$CONTAINER_KEY" ] && [ -d "$HOME/.claude/projects/$HOST_KEY" ]; then ln -sfn "$HOME/.claude/projects/$HOST_KEY" "$HOME/.claude/projects/$CONTAINER_KEY"; fi
